overview: TaskFlow Pro is a premium mobile-first task management web app with a Notion+Linear level of polish. Users can manage tasks with priorities, deadlines, and categories, track weekly productivity with charts, and view all their work through a beautiful dashboard. Built with dark mode, glassmorphism accents, smooth animations, and bottom navigation for a native app feel.
features: Authentication with session persistence and protected routes
Premium dashboard with productivity stats and weekly chart
Task CRUD with priorities, deadlines, and categories
Profile section with settings and dark mode toggle
Smooth page and task completion animations
